underlying_goal: Design and implement a domain-aware code review system with local skill and GitHub Action CI reviewer, replacing generic review tools with project-specific knowledge
friction_detail: Skill was placed in skills/ directory instead of commands/ directory, so it didn't show up in /commands until user flagged it
brief_summary: User wanted a domain-aware code review system (local skill + GitHub Action) with product knowledge docs, and got the full system designed, implemented across 12 files, reviewed, published to the team plugin, and a draft PR created.
